things.name: Sydney Opera House
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage iconic sail-shaped performing arts centre on Bennelong Point

things.name: Sydney Harbour Bridge
things.description: The 'Coathanger' - climb to the 134m summit for panoramic harbour views

things.name: Bondi Beach
things.description: Australia's most famous beach with surf culture, the coastal walk and Icebergs pool

things.name: Taronga Zoo
things.description: World-class zoo on the harbour foreshore with koalas, kangaroos and harbour views

things.name: The Rocks
things.description: Sydney's historic sandstone precinct with colonial buildings, markets and pubs

things.name: Royal Botanic Garden
things.description: 26-hectare garden on the harbour edge with free entry and flying fox colony

things.name: Manly Beach & Ferry
things.description: 30-minute scenic ferry across the harbour to this surfing beach and oceanarium

things.name: Blue Mountains National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage sandstone escarpment with the Three Sisters rock formation

things.name: Darling Harbour
things.description: Entertainment precinct with Sea Life Sydney Aquarium, Wild Life Zoo and museums

things.name: Art Gallery of NSW
things.description: Australia's oldest and most prestigious art museum in a grand Victorian building
